description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage and four jobs: test_php56, test_php70, test_php71, and test_php72. Each job runs in its own Docker image (php:5.6, php:7.0, php:7.1, php:7.2). In the before_script of every job execute: apt-get update, apt-get install zip unzip, php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');", php composer-setup.php, php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php');", and php composer.phar install. Then the script runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml. All jobs belong to the test stage and have no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
